name: Is AEO common in California federal court?
description: **Common but challengeable.** Balance secrets vs. defense.[2]

mainEntity.name: Is AEO common in California federal court?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Common but challengeable.** Balance secrets vs. defense.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, common but must balance defense rights; overuse challenged.** Protective orders routine.[2] Key factors: NDCA/EDCA local rules. Meet/confer required. Sanctions possible. Tailor to case. CA counsel advised.
